subcodes.first_line: We have heard thy call and beheld thy turning, thy devotion and thy burning ardor in separation from thy Lord. Verily, We make mention of thee from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمعنا ندائک و راینا توجهک و اقبالک و اشتعالک فی هجر مولیک انا ذکرناک من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
